{{CargoRelic
|name=Noble Brooch
|class_id=20018
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=This brooch once belonged to a nobleman whose ancestor was a Count of the House of Habsburg. The Countess had a large number of precious jewelry, including thousands of brooches which were enough for future generations to live on for decades!
|fame=14
|art=28
|fth=20
|civ=12
|tech=16
|ss1=Per 1k Tadpole Points, Snail DEF +1<br>Tadpole Points: 20000/20000
|ss2=Per 1k Tadpole Points, Snail DEF +2<br>Tadpole Points: 20000/20000
|ss3=Per 1k Tadpole Points, Snail DEF +3<br>Tadpole Points: 20000/20000
|ss4=Per 1k Tadpole Points, Snail DEF +3<br>Tadpole Points: 20000/20000
|ss7=Per 1k Tadpole Points, Snail DEF +3<br>Tadpole Points: 20000/20000<br> (Awakened)
}}
